title: Curriculum Vitae
body:
Software Engineer — highly-available, high-throughput, AWS-native and self-hosted systems.

Amazon — Prime Video Sports · SDE II · 2022–present. Design and operate highly-available, high-throughput services and ETL pipelines for live sports streaming; built a VLM-based event-monitoring system deployed catalog-wide (stress-tested during Black Friday Football); reclaimed $350K+ in AWS spend; shipped a self-service slate portal (2 dev-days → 0); drove AI-assisted log diagnosis.

PIMCO — Platform Engineering · SWE · 2020–2022. Architected the Okta transition (onboarding weeks → 2 days); onboarded Datadog (MTTR 9 days → 2); one-commit CI/CD adoption firm-wide; led on-prem → AWS migration.

Education: Texas A&M University — B.S. Computer Science (AI/ML), minors in Math & Cybersecurity, Summa Cum Laude.

Skills: Java, Kotlin, Python, TypeScript, Rust · deep AWS breadth + MongoDB · high-availability & high-throughput distributed systems, ETL pipelines · CI/CD (GitHub Actions, GitLab).
